LanguageData.VOE_DisableIntegrationDesc: Disables all Empire-VOE military integration. Outposts will not be raided and defensive outposts will not auto-defend.
LanguageData.VOE_OutpostDefendedDesc: Your outpost {0} successfully repelled an enemy raid.
LanguageData.VOE_OutpostRaidedDesc: Your outpost {0} was raided! {1} colonists were injured and some supplies were lost.
LanguageData.VOE_ChangeDefenderDesc: Select an Empire settlement to defend this outpost.
LanguageData.VOE_DeliveryOutpostDesc: Choose where taxes from this settlement are delivered. Currently: {0}
LanguageData.VOE_FinancingOutpostDesc: Choose an outpost to fund this settlement's payments. Currently: {0}
LanguageData.VOE_TaxRedirectedDesc: The outpost designated to receive taxes from {0} no longer exists. Shipment redirected to {1}.
LanguageData.VOE_InvalidDeliveryOutpost: {0} tried to deliver taxes to an invalid outpost. Delivery destination has been reset.
LanguageData.VOE_FinancingPartiallyDepleted: {0}'s funds are depleted. Remaining {1} silver will be drawn from your coffers.
LanguageData.VOE_DebugLoggingDesc: Enable verbose debug logging for EmpireVOE integration.
LanguageData.VOE_RequireTownDesc: Empire settlements can only be founded on Town outposts.
LanguageData.VOE_ConvertTownPawnsDesc: Town pawns are transferred to the new settlement on creation.
LanguageData.VOE_PawnSkillBonusesDesc: When specialists are not available, apply production bonuses based on Town pawn skills.
LanguageData.VOE_ScalingBonusDesc: Multiply bonus by number of thresholds met (otherwise flat).
LanguageData.VOE_NotATown: Empire settlements must be founded on Town outposts.
LanguageData.VOE_TownIncorporatedDesc: The town {0} has been incorporated into your new settlement {1}. {2} residents have been transferred.
